generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed within building infrastructure to detect occupancy patterns, transmitting real-time data via MQTT protocol to Eclipse Hono telemetry ingestion layer. Sensor metadata (device ID, endpoint address) automatically extracted from BIM model for runtime integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light sensor measuring ambient light levels within building spaces, integrated with BIM-based control logic for adaptive lighting systems. Data transmitted via MQTT protocol to Eclipse Hono middleware for processing."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring temperature and humidity conditions within building environment, deployed according to BIM-defined sensor placement. Data transmitted via MQTT protocol to Eclipse Hono for real-time environmental monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime semantics including device configurations, control logic, and sensor metadata extracted via model-driven transformations. Serves as foundational digital representation of physical building assets."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RuntimeSemanticLayer : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data layer combining BIM-based geometric/spatial data with real-time sensor readings and control signals, creating unified digital representation of building infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualizationEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Automatically generated control logic configurations extracted from BIM models, defining operational parameters for building systems like lighting and HVAC. Used for automated commissioning of physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE frameworks automating generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models, including middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto and Unreal Engine plugins. Enables end-to-end automation of DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono telemetry ingestion layer receiving real-time sensor data via MQTT protocol, processing and routing data to Eclipse Ditto for unified management. Facilitates physical-to-virtual data synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto unified data management platform enabling bidirectional communication between physical systems and digital twin, with standardized device management interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, StandardizedExtensionService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D runtime visualization and simulation capabilities for digital twin monitoring and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive system optimization, balancing energy efficiency, visual comfort, and occupant health metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for generating runtime artifacts from BIM models including middleware configurations and Unreal Engine plugins for digital twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemCommissioningAction
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D monitoring and simulation service rendered through Unreal Engine 5, providing real-time visualization of building operations and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceVisualizationInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning service executing BIM-embedded control logic for building systems (lighting, HVAC) during initial deployment and operational phases."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemCommissioningAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization service adjusting building systems (e.g., lighting) in real-time to balance energy efficiency, visual comfort, and occupant health metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyRecommendationInsight, OccupantHealthOptimizationInsight
]

instance StandardizedExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular plugin framework enabling integration of custom services (energy management, predictive maintenance) through standardized extension points generated from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous operational monitoring service tracking energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions through real-time sensor data processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalAnalyticsInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance and performance forecasting service analyzing historical and real-time data to identify potential failures and operational inefficiencies."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight, PerformanceForecastInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of current building performance metrics including energy consumption, occupancy distribution, and environmental conditions rendered in Unreal Engine."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time analysis of occupancy patterns derived from sensor data, enabling optimized space utilization and operational planning."
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven suggestions for improving energy efficiency through adaptive control adjustments, generated by reinforcement learning algorithms."
]

instance OccupantHealthOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing lighting and environmental conditions to enhance occupant health and well-being based on real-time sensor data."
]

instance OperationalAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive analysis of building operations including energy consumption patterns, equipment performance, and environmental conditions."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring and analysis of temperature, humidity, and light levels within building spaces for operational control."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive alerts identifying potential sensor/actuator failures or performance degradation based on predictive analytics models."
]

instance PerformanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted building performance metrics including energy consumption projections and equipment reliability assessments."
]

instance SystemCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of BIM-embedded control logic for initial system commissioning and operational configuration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy patterns and environmental conditions to optimize energy use and visual comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic integration of third-party services through standardized plugin architecture, enabling extended functionality without core system modifications."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic dimmer actuator controlled via digital twin commands, implementing adaptive lighting scenarios based on reinforcement learning optimization algorithms."
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system valve actuator configured through BIM-embedded control logic, receiving operational commands from the digital twin for energy-efficient climate control."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting system integrating sensors, actuators, and control logic for dynamic adjustment of light levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment including operational systems (lighting, HVAC) and sensor/actuator network integrated with digital twin for real-time monitoring and control."
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, LightingDimmerActuator, HVACValveActuator, AdaptiveLightingSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual runtime environment hosting all digital twin components including models, services, and enablers for processing physical data and generating insights."
    base:contains BimEnrichedModel, RuntimeSemanticLayer, ControlLogicConfiguration, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngineVisualizationEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled via **bidirectional control logic** generated from BIM models and deployed through the framework. The DT processes inputs (e.g., occupancy data) to generate control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments) and transmits them back to actuators via the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). This interaction is automated through **model-to-text transformations**, where BIM-based control semantics are translated into executable runtime artifacts (e.g., RESTful APIs or IoT device commands)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with **low-latency synchronization** between physical and virtual systems to ensure operational relevance. The framework emphasizes **live data ingestion** and **immediate processing** of sensor inputs, enabling **sub-second latency** for critical control actions (e.g., emergency responses, adaptive lighting adjustments). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **real-time fidelity** of the DT, quantifying how closely the virtual representation aligns with the physical asset’s current state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The semantic backbone for physical asset representation.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
   - **Runtime Engine**: Hosts generated interfaces (e.g., APIs, IoT bindings) and executes control logic.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation.
   - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating third-party services (e.g., analytics, AI models). The constellation is deployed as a **modular, scalable platform** with clear separation of concerns between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life cycle stages**, including:
   - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device configurations and control logic.
   - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors/actuators are deployed, and BIM data is validated for runtime compatibility.
   - **Operation phase**: The DT enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control.
   - **Refurbishment phase**: The DT supports retrofitting and upgrades by integrating new sensor/actuator data into the BIM model. The framework ensures continuity across stages via **model-driven transformations** and **runtime configuration management**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: Verification of the BIM model’s compliance with deployment requirements before transformation.
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantitative evaluation of the DT’s synchronization with the physical system, measuring **semantic coherence** and **real-time accuracy**.
   - **Synchronization Techniques**: Mechanisms to mitigate **semantic drift** (as referenced in related work) and ensure continuous alignment between the DT and physical asset. The framework does not explicitly detail **uncertainty handling** or **error correction mechanisms**, but emphasizes **validation-driven deployment** and **real-time synchronization**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT’s technical connection is established via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware**, which provide **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional communication** between the physical system and the DT. The framework leverages **standardized protocols** (implicitly referenced in the context of middleware integration) to ensure seamless interoperability. While specific protocols like **MQTT or REST** are not explicitly mentioned, the middleware’s role in enabling **live synchronization** and **control signal transmission** is central to the DT’s technical connection."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable, modular architecture** with **standardized extension points**, enabling both **centralized and decentralized hosting** configurations. The framework supports **cloud-based or on-premise deployment** (implied by scalability requirements) and ensures **low-overhead updates** for maintainability. The deployment process is automated through **model-driven transformations**, reducing manual intervention and enabling **reproducible DT setups** across projects."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** with **heterogeneous systems** through:
   - **Standardized integration frameworks** for interoperability with **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and other operational platforms.
   - **Modular service architecture** enabling seamless communication with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools).
   The framework does not explicitly mention **Building Management Systems (BMS)** or **Energy Management Systems (EMS)**, but emphasizes **interoperability** with domain-specific systems via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the **semantic foundation** for modeling physical assets. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBie) are not explicitly listed, the framework leverages **BIM’s structured data models** to ensure **interoperability and consistency** across deployment phases. The use of **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** aligns with **open-source, standardized middleware protocols**, though detailed compliance with additional protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA) is not provided."
]
